label: Porsche Taycan (J1 platform). Audi e-tron GT shares architecture.
notes: Taycan exposes BMS SOC, SOH, kWh energy content, per-cell voltage, cell imbalance and module temperatures via UDS Mode 22 (confirmed by Car Scanner community). However, the per-DID, per-byte decode table is bundled commercially in Car Scanner and PoCOM and is not redistributable in any open-source repository.

unavailable_fields.all: Field not documented for this vendor in any open public source. Recommend partnership with Car Scanner / PoCOM authors or extraction from PIWIS ODX.
